rules_applied: sadAssRegisterSplit: Establish formal 'Triestige Ezel' (canon) vs casual 'Triestigaard' (Flemish -aard epithet, affectionate-mocking) as parallel forms for Sad Ass — same shape as Trouwe Ezel/Trouwe split. Codex update required post-pass: legitimize Triestigaard as accepted casual form. Per-line disposition: formal contexts (third-person, stage directions, peer formal address) → Triestige Ezel; intimate/casual peer address, family register ('Uncle Sad'), and emotional shouting → Triestigaard.
decision_status: Q8 fully locked. 7 corrections (Triestigaard → Triestige Ezel) + 13 documented keeps. Big Ass scope: zero flips (both Big lines are register-correct casual address).

corrections.rationale: Hard Ass — formal third-person mention ('Give my best to Sad Ass'). Distanced register.
corrections.speaker: Hard Ass
corrections.english: Give my best to Sad Ass.
Politely suggest that Sad Ass should suck it up.
corrections.current_nl: Stel tactvol voor dat Triestigaard op haar tanden bijt.
corrections.proposed_nl: Stel tactvol voor dat Triestige Ezel op haar tanden bijt.

corrections.english: Commiserate with Sad Ass over all that has been lost.
corrections.current_nl: Herdenk met Triestigaard over al wat er verloren is gegaan.
corrections.proposed_nl: Herdenk met Triestige Ezel over al wat er verloren is gegaan.

corrections.current_nl: Ik zoek Triestigaard en Stoere Ezel en breng ze naar de rivier.
corrections.proposed_nl: Ik zoek Triestige Ezel en Stoere Ezel en breng ze naar de rivier.

corrections.proposed_nl: Triestige Ezel? Kameraad? Wat is jouw beslissing?
